misc: Rarely seen on the course without a drink in his hand
biography: Martin, representing St. Laurence Golf, is a deeply ingrained figure within the Hector Trophée landscape. His confirmed participation in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his eleventh foray into this prestigious competition, signifying a remarkable and enduring commitment to its unique multi-day format.

Over his ten previous engagements, Martin has demonstrated exceptional versatility, securing both the coveted Hector Trophée for the triumphant pair and the esteemed Victor Trophy for individual excellence. These dual accolades underscore his capacity to excel under varying pressures, mastering both the collaborative dynamics and the singular challenges of the event.

Beyond his impressive record, Martin is often observed navigating the course with a distinctive, unruffled demeanor, frequently seen with a beverage in hand. This relaxed posture, however, belies a sharp competitive instinct and a focused approach to each shot, proving that composure can indeed coexist with the drive for victory.

As Martin prepares for his eleventh appearance, his established record of success in both major categories positions him as a formidable contender. His consistent presence, combined with a unique on-course style, ensures he remains a captivating figure at the Hector Trophée, perpetually pursuing further distinction.
